To Strike First Amended Complaint Of Plaintiff

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2002 Advanced From Jan-22-02 To Jan-08-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

To Strike First Amended Complaint Of Plaintiff
Off Calendar Jan-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Scott D. Christensen, Esq. 530/823-1780 for Plaintiff ARDEN & HOWE INVESTMENT PARTNERS, LLC opposing party

No appearance by defendant MARC L. GUERRETTE moving party. The Court overruled the demurrer with five days leave to answer. Motion to strike punitive damages and the Prayer for attorney fees denied. (JJM/kh) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
